name: mobius-mcp
description: Give AI coding agents live access to your web app's runtime via MCP.
author: Topman-14

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/capture-core -w apps/mcp-server -w apps/npm-client -w apps/browser-extension
scripts.watch: npm run build -w packages/capture-core -w apps/mcp-server && concurrently -n packages,extension,mcp-server -c yellow,magenta,cyan "tsc -b packages/capture-core --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "npm run watch -w apps/browser-extension" "npm run watch -w apps/mcp-server"
